jwallet.title: Jibrel Wallet
jwallet.description: Jwallet provides a user-friendly and secure way to transact your favorite Ethereum tokens

jcash.title: Jibrel Cash
jcash.description: Jcash provides users with the ability to exchange volatile digital assets for currency-backed stable coins

enterprise_1.title: Transaction & Data Analytics
enterprise_1.description: Looking for digital asset transaction and data analytics? Jsearch provides transfer and smart contract data via an easily configurable API. Jibrel analytics solution also has compliance built-in, powered by Jclear, Jibrel’s digital asset AML / KYC solution

enterprise_2.title: Real-time Digital Asset Price Feeds
enterprise_2.description: Keeping up-to-date with latest digital currency exchange prices feeds can be a challenge. With Jticker, you can ensure your trading desks and algorithms have reliable and verifiable price feeds

enterprise_3.title: Reliable Ethereum Connectivity
enterprise_3.description: Contact us to learn more about Jnode, an Enterprise-grade Ethereum connection, with 99.99% Uptime, it is the most secure and reliable solution for scalable Ethereum infrastructure
